name: sca_sustained_delta
description: SCA sustained delta load — moderate fleet continuously syncing deltas over 30 minutes.
notes: Represents: 50 agents with scan_interval=5s (accelerated from real 12h for testing).
Each agent sends 200 modified checks per session (partial policy delta).
Purpose: Detect if manager leaks memory per-session (Context objects, GapSet,
RocksDB iterators, FlatBufferBuilder allocations not freed after session close).
Expected behavior: RSS should stabilize within 5 min (sawtooth pattern).
If RSS grows monotonically > 120 MB over baseline after 30 min → leak.
Agent-side equivalent: m_syncedIds grows to 200 entries (§3.3) but stable.
Manager-side: sessions create/destroy at steady rate → memory should be flat.
session_delay=5 ensures each agent completes one session before starting the
next, mimicking the real SCA sync pattern (no concurrent sessions per agent).
